row_actions.visibility: hidden by default via CSS — reveal on tr:hover

pagination.row_count: Always show 'Showing X–Y of Z' left of pagination

empty_state.heading: No Data… For Now!
empty_state.subtext: No records match your current filters. Try adjusting your search.
empty_state.rule: Keep <thead> and pagination visible. No Refresh button. Never use 🚧 here.
empty_state.example_html:
🚦
No Data… For Now!
No records match your current filters.

bulk_toolbar.position: Above table, replaces or overlays filter bar
bulk_toolbar.contents: Selected count + bulk action buttons (Delete, Export, etc.)
use_for: any list page with bulk operations

do: Always follow column order: checkbox → data → status → actions.
Keep actions in their own col-actions cell — never share with status.
Keep thead visible in empty and error states.
Use .row-actions hidden by CSS, revealed on tr:hover.
dont: Never put action icons in the same <td> as the status badge.
Never hide thead in empty state.
Never use 🚧 in table empty state — always 🚦.
Never add a Refresh button in the empty state.
example_html:
Name Status
Finding name Open
Showing 1–25 of 148

react.note: Add 'group' class to <tr>, use group-hover:opacity-100 on action cell
